head.title: Corporate | MOONSTONE ADVOCATES
head.description: Corporate solicitors helping businesses grow, secure investment, complete acquisitions and plan successful exits with clear, commercial legal advice.
head.ogDescription: Corporate solicitors helping businesses grow, secure investment, complete acquisitions and plan successful exits with clear, commercial legal advice.

blocks.html:
Corporate

Our Corporate team works shoulder to shoulder with business owners and leadership teams to shape, support, and deliver their strategic goals. Whether it’s building through acquisitions, securing investment, or planning a successful exit, we offer tailored legal advice that’s commercially driven and easy to understand.

For businesses
Corporate

Services

We take the time to understand what really drives each business. As trusted advisers, we build long-term relationships and bring a blend of legal expertise, real-world experience, and commercial acumen to every conversation. Our expertise is tailored to your success.

Speak to an expert

Corporate Governance

We help businesses build strong governance frameworks that support growth, manage risk, and meet regulatory standards.

Corporate Reorganisation

We advise on complex corporate restructurings, from integrations and carve-outs to capital changes and hive-ups, working closely with your wider advisory team to keep things on track.

Private Equity and Venture Capital

From buy-outs to growth capital, we support investors, founders, and management teams with clear, pragmatic advice at every stage of the deal.

Share Option and Incentive Scheme

We design share and incentive schemes that help you reward key people, retain control, and protect shareholder value.

Strategic M&A and Joint Ventures

Whether you’re buying, selling, or partnering, we’ll help you structure your deal for success with clear legal advice and commercial insight.

Uganda Private Capital members.

We're members of Uganda Private Capital, the Uganda's leading voice for private capital. Our membership strengthens our ability to connect you with the people, capital and insights that drive growth, investment, and successful transactions.

It also strengthens our growing Private Equity and Venture Capital offering, where we support both institutions and founder and management teams, alongside our Banking, Finance & Institutions team.

Whether you're raising investment, funding growth or planning a transaction, we're well placed to connect you with the right people and support you at every stage.

I wanted to take the opportunity and send a big thank you to you, Rebecca and Daisy. I have never before experienced a situation similar to the one I found myself in recently, and I must say having you in my court made all the difference (and I won’t exaggerate if I say it helped me sleep at night).
Corporate Client

I am so pleased that we chose to work with Alex and her colleagues on this project, as they have been an absolute pleasure to deal with and so helpful and patient along the way, making the process much easier than it could have been and getting us to the position we are now in, with a completion!

I still remember when we first met almost 23 years ago now (come May/June) in your office in Kampala and am therefore delighted that all those years later and after the help you have provided at different points, that you and your colleagues have played such a big part in the sale process to the EOT and completion.

I was impressed by the team at Black Solicitors LLP. Every member of staff I dealt with was pleasant and professional, demonstrating a clear commitment to helping me rather than just driving up costs.

Very impressed with their experience from start to finish. The legal team were exceptionally friendly, welcoming, and professional throughout. The security staff were particularly polite and approachable, making visitors feel comfortable as soon as they arrived.
Moonstone Client

A special mention to Alex Hall who went above and beyond in her assistance to get our deal over the line. In what ended up being very difficult protracted negotiations, Alex made herself available to us throughout and worked evenings and I am sure some weekends to assist us. She is a very valuable asset to the business, and we cannot speak highly enough of.
